name: RoseTree

unions.name: RoseTree
unions.comment:
RoseTree type.
A rosetree is a tree with a root whose children are themselves
rosetrees.

values.name: addChild
values.comment: Add a child to the rosetree.
values.type: RoseTree a -> RoseTree a -> RoseTree a

values.name: andMap
values.type: RoseTree (a -> b) -> RoseTree a -> RoseTree b

values.name: andThen
values.type: RoseTree a -> (a -> RoseTree b) -> RoseTree b

values.name: children
values.comment: Get the children of a rosetree
values.type: RoseTree a -> LazyList (RoseTree a)

values.name: flatMap
values.type: (a -> RoseTree b) -> RoseTree a -> RoseTree b

values.name: flatten
values.type: RoseTree (RoseTree a) -> RoseTree a

values.name: hasChildren
values.type: RoseTree a -> Bool

values.name: map
values.comment: Map a function over a rosetree
values.type: (a -> b) -> RoseTree a -> RoseTree b

values.name: map2
values.type: (a -> b -> c) -> RoseTree a -> RoseTree b -> RoseTree c

values.name: map3
values.type: (a -> b -> c -> d) -> RoseTree a -> RoseTree b -> RoseTree c -> RoseTree d

values.name: map4
values.type: (a -> b -> c -> d -> e) -> RoseTree a -> RoseTree b -> RoseTree c -> RoseTree d -> RoseTree e

values.name: map5
values.type: (a -> b -> c -> d -> e -> f) -> RoseTree a -> RoseTree b -> RoseTree c -> RoseTree d -> RoseTree e -> RoseTree f

values.name: product
values.type: RoseTree number -> number

values.name: reduce
values.type: (a -> b -> b) -> b -> RoseTree a -> b

values.name: root
values.comment: Get the root of a rosetree
values.type: RoseTree a -> a

values.name: singleton
values.type: a -> RoseTree a

values.name: sum
values.type: RoseTree number -> number

values.name: zip
values.type: RoseTree a -> RoseTree b -> RoseTree ( a, b )

values.name: zip3
values.type: RoseTree a -> RoseTree b -> RoseTree c -> RoseTree ( a, b, c )

values.name: zip4
values.type: RoseTree a -> RoseTree b -> RoseTree c -> RoseTree d -> RoseTree ( a, b, c, d )

values.name: zip5
values.type: RoseTree a -> RoseTree b -> RoseTree c -> RoseTree d -> RoseTree e -> RoseTree ( a, b, c, d, e )
